statusLine: European fuel security is under strain with 14 of 27 countries holding critical stock levels while regional averages remain above mandatory minimums.
fullAnalysis:
European oil stock levels show significant regional disparities despite EU-wide averages remaining above the mandatory 90-day threshold. Petrol stocks average 98.7 days and diesel 97.4 days across the bloc, but this masks concerning shortfalls in major economies. Romania faces the most severe situation with diesel stocks at just 20.2 days, while Poland and Spain also show critical shortages across all fuel types.

Fourteen of 27 EU countries currently hold critical stock levels in at least one fuel category, with diesel particularly affected. Major economies including Germany (64.2 days diesel), France (83.4 days diesel), and Italy (64.3 days diesel) all report diesel stocks below the 90-day minimum. Jet fuel presents additional challenges, with 17 countries below the safety threshold including aviation hubs like Germany and France.

Fuel prices reflect ongoing market pressure, with diesel commanding a €0.237 premium over petrol EU-wide. Brent crude's recent 9% decline to $90.38 provides some relief, though prices remain elevated at 27% above pre-conflict levels. The price disparities across member states are stark, with Netherlands petrol at €2.316 per litre compared to Malta's €1.34, highlighting varying national tax policies and supply chain pressures.
keyPoints: 14 of 27 EU countries report critical stock levels in at least one fuel category, despite regional averages above 90-day minimums
Romania shows the most severe shortages with diesel stocks at just 20.2 days, followed by Poland and Spain with multiple critical categories
Diesel faces particular strain with major economies Germany, France, and Italy all below mandatory thresholds
Jet fuel stocks present widespread challenges with 17 countries below 90-day requirements, affecting key aviation hubs
Fuel prices remain elevated with diesel at €2.021/L despite Brent crude's recent 9% decline to $90.38
